title: phyllanthus trichogynus
intro: Phyllanthus trichogynus, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a tropical plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat liver and kidney problems due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus trichogynus include its ability to improve liver function, reduce blood sugar levels, and support immune system health. Phyllanthus trichogynus is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is available in various herbal preparations.
